scripts.build: pnpm run clean && pnpm run build:js && pnpm run build:types
scripts.build:js: node ../../scripts/build-esbuild-bundled.mjs src/index.ts dist/index.js && node ../../scripts/build-esbuild-bundled.mjs src/cli.ts dist/cli.js && node ../../scripts/build-esbuild-bundled.mjs src/benchmark.ts dist/benchmark.js && node ../../scripts/build-esbuild-bundled.mjs src/errors.ts dist/errors.js && node ../../scripts/build-esbuild-bundled.mjs src/parser.ts dist/parser.js && node ../../scripts/build-esbuild-bundled.mjs src/parser-core.ts dist/parser-core.js && node ../../scripts/build-esbuild-bundled.mjs src/parser-utils.ts dist/parser-utils.js && node ../../scripts/build-esbuild-bundled.mjs src/types.ts dist/types.js
